actions_taken: NO override changes this tick. Rationale: (i) all guardrails binding with comfortable buffer — deployment 15.17 pp on filled book and 10.38 pp on GLENMARK full-fill; sector caps 9.68+ pp on every cluster; position cap 2.68 pp on largest name (NESTLEIND); SL bands all clean. (ii) Book is POSITIVE on day (+0.76%) and cumulative (+0.32%) — no loss-vector firing. (iii) Cadence on Day-7 morning is 1 NEW BUY in 50 min — measured, not the Day-5 stacking pattern that originally drove the 0.65 deployed-cap fire. Strategy posture appears more disciplined post-Day-6 panic-exit review (rules 12 + 15 prompt fixes appear to be holding). (iv) NO pre-armed trigger fires this tick (5 of 5 from 09:30 dormant). (v) Decoratively tightening on a healthy, positive, recently-de-risked book at 10:00 of Day-7 would friction the strategy without addressing any live risk vector. Current override stack (min_confidence 0.65, max_position_pct 0.15, max_deployed_pct 0.65, default_sl_pct 0.015, min_sl_pct 0.01, max_sl_pct 0.04, daily_loss_limit_pct 0.04, max_sector_pct 0.22) remains correctly calibrated for the carried structural concentration profile and is NOT relaxed. Pharma re-loading and stale TATAPOWER/PHARMABEES OPENs are noted for OBSERVATION; pre-armed triggers (A2)–(E2) capture the next firing conditions for the 10:30 tick.
